note: Official Spatial-Intelligence Benchmark — append-only signed ledger. Entries are real harness scores only; no seeded numbers.

caveat: Protocol-matched MM-Fi random_split result; NOT solved real-world generalization. Random split has temporal/subject-adjacency effects common to this benchmark family. Leakage-free cross-subject is far lower (~11-27%) and is the real deployment frontier.
